ModuleManufacturerTrust.heading: Approved by leading PV module manufacturers
ModuleManufacturerTrust.body: Taypro cleaning robots are accepted for use on plants with modules from top-tier manufacturers, so waterless robotic cleaning does not put your module warranty at risk.
ModuleManufacturerTrust.manufacturerListAria: PV module manufacturers that have approved Taypro cleaning robots
ModuleManufacturerTrust.disclaimer: Company names are used for identification only. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners and do not imply endorsement by those companies.
